notes: KRX regular session; pre-open includes liquidity checks and reference price formation for some products.

events.label: Pre-open / reference window
events.detail: Order imbalance disclosure and reference price formation ahead of 09:00 cash open.

events.label: KOSPI/KOSDAQ cash open
events.detail: Regular continuous trading begins; overnight US tape and futures set the opening auction context.

events.label: Mid-session block
events.detail: Lunch-hour liquidity pattern; global headline risk can still move ADRs and index futures during the break.
